text: Each vessel in ocean and coastwise service must have an approved EPIRB. An EPIRB ____________.
options: must be stowed in a manner so that it will float free if the vessel sinks
must be stowed where it is readily accessible for testing and use
is a device that transmits a radio signal

text: To operate a carbon dioxide extinguisher having the type of head shown in the illustration, you would ____________.
options: does not block access to the fire station hydrant
will cover no more than 25 percent of deck space
will be easily visible from the bridge

text: Prior to entering a compartment containing an atmosphere potentially dangerous to life or health, you should don an approved self-contained breathing apparatus. Which one of the listed devices is a self-contained breathing apparatus?
The knife edges and gaskets of watertight doors should be _____________.
While wearing a demand-type self-contained breathing  apparatus the alarm bell begins ringing. Which of the  following conditions does this indicate?
options: There is a 4-5 minute supply of air remaining in the air cylinder.
There is approximately 35bar (3.5 MPa) of pressure left in the air cylinder.
The wearer should immediately leave the contaminated area.

text: When is it required for carbon dioxide fire extinguishers to be recharged?
options: When the charged weight decreases by 10%.
When the trigger seal has been broken.

text: If a fixed fire extinguishing system is installed on any vessel, it must be of a type approved by the _____________.
Which of the following pressures represents the normal  pressure setting of a pressure-vacuum relief valve?
To avoid excessive pressures in the fuel oil filling  system during bunkering, you should ____________.
options: close the tank filling valves quickly
top off all tanks at the same time
fill completely all tanks to less than 95% full
reduce the loading rate when topping off

text: Prior to loading or discharging bulk cargo, all sea valves should be _____________.
options: secured and locked pull pin, open valve, and pull up on release lever
opened and lashed open valve and pull pin

text: A safety "ring pin" is usually inserted in the handle of a CO2 fire extinguisher to prevent _____________.
options: the cylinder valve from coming loose
the handle from contacting the cylinder

text: A carbon dioxide fire extinguisher has been partially  discharged, and should be immediately _____________.
options: tagged and restowed properly in its rack
weighed and the charge loss recorded
given to the chief engineer for recharging
tagged "empty" and stowed separately from charged   extinguishers

text: You are replacing a section of heavy piping on deck and  using a chain fall to lift the pipe. Which of the following precautions should be taken to prevent personal injury?
options: Position several men under the pipe so they can catch it if it falls.
Attach lines to the ends of the pipe and have your helpers steady the load.
Place an old mattress under the hoist to prevent the load from hitting the deck.
Have a first aid kit at the job site.

text: A flat block placed under the end of a shore for the purpose of distributing pressure is referred to as a ____________.

options: There must be at least one shore connection to the fire main system on each side of the vessel.
Shore connections must be in an accessible location and  fitted with cutoff and check valves.
There must be at least one portable international shore  connection available to each side of the vessel.

text: Fire doors are released by a/an _____________.
options: hydraulic directional valve that automatically releases the door in the event of a disruption to the control power system
spring-loaded catch that automatically lifts to release the door in the event of the presence of a fire
method that automaticly releases the door in the event of a disruption of control system power

text: For all loading operations, the terminal must supply the vessel with a means in which the vessel's designated  person-in-charge may stop the flow of oil to the vessel, insuring immediate shutdown in the event of a hose rupture, tank overflow, etc. This me
options: via a communications device used for no other purpose

text: If a leak in an oil hose coupling cannot be stopped by  tightening the coupling bolts, you should ____________.
options: notify the Master of a potential pollution incident
reduce the pumping pressure to reduce the leakage rate
spread absorbent material on deck beneath the leak

text: According to Regulations , each fire hydrant must have at least _____________.
options: a hose rack or other device for stowing hose

text: A gurgling noise is heard from within a cargo tank when discharging cargo, this would indicate that the ___________.
options: tank foot valve is partially clogged

text: If your vessel is to carry ten portable foam fire   extinguishers, you must maintain a supply of at least  ____________.
In order to release CO2 to the machinery spaces from a  fixed fire extinguishing system, you must _____________.
options: actuate an alarm and open the engine room control valve
actuate an alarm and open the engine room CO2 releasing  valve
open the engine room control valve and shut off engine room ventilation fans
open the engine room control valve and then the CO2   releasing valve

text: If the overflow tank high-level alarm sounds while the fuel oil tanks are being topped off, the engineer should   _____________.
options: close the static leg filling valve
close the overflow tank filling valve
reduce the fuel oil pumping rate

text: A cylinder used for storing CO2 in a fixed firefighting  system, must be hydrostatically retested and restamped every _____________.

The lengthening of a crack formed in the shell plating of a ship may be prevented by ________.
options: welding brackets across both ends of the crack
chipping out and slot welding the entire crack

text: One precaution to take prior to working in a freshly painted compartment where there are an excessive amount of paint fumes, is to _____________.
options: wear a breathing apparatus while working
keep a charged fire hose handy

text: Which of the listed pumping arrangements will be hazardous when two similar centrifugal pumps are used to discharge a cargo of flammable liquid?
options: Both pumps operating at the same speed and discharging into a common line.
Both pumps operating at the same speed and taking suction from a common line.
Each pump operating at a different speed and taking suction from a common line.
Each pump operating at a different pressure and discharging into a common line.

text: A portable foam fire extinguisher carried aboard a tank  vessel must be recharged every _____________.

options: Increased viscosity of the product needs higher loading  pressure, which increases the chances of a spill.
Air pockets may cause the fuel to bubble out of the ullage hole.
The temperature rise of the fuel will cause an overflow.
Fueling valve may become stuck closed and cause the fuel oil to spill before the valve can be opened.

text: To avoid shock pressures in the fuel oil filling hoses while you are topping off tanks, the ____________.

options: A separate supply of carbon dioxide must be provided for each space protected.

text: The fire extinguishing action of CO2 comes mostly from _____________.

isolating the heat from the fuel

a sample has been taken from the oil being received
an oil containment boom is available for immediate use

everyone is suited in an approved life preserver

options: fuel oil strainers into the ship's bilges
lube oil strainers into fixed drip pans

options: determine which type of fire is burning

text: While on watch in the engine room, you hear a continuous sounding of the general alarm. Which of the following  actions should you take FIRST?

reduces magnetic pull on the plunger and requires less  current to trip the relay
increases magnetic pull on the plunger and requires more current to trip the relay

options: mhos a pair of insulated metal pliers

text: The number of cells in a 12 volt lead-acid battery is ________________.

options: inductive reaction of the rotating stator field

options: reached when the conductor it is protecting becomes "white hot."

options: Fill the motor housing with CO2 to inert the space.

text: In a cartridge-type fuse, the metal element is contained in a ___________________.

What will be the phase angle relationship of a six-pole, three-phase, rotating field generator?

options: NDN and PNP are the two basic types of transistors.

Neither transistors nor vacuum tubes require heat for  electrons to flow.

text: The type of control circuit that will not permit automatic restarting after power is restored, following a power failure is called _____________.

differences in weight between water and the liquid measured

options: Low torque starting of small motors

text: The unit of apparent power in a purely inductive circuit is called the _____________.

options: type of function they can perform

text: The multiple prefix "kilo" means ____________.

options: The series fields of both generators are connected in  series.
The series fields of both generators are connected in  parallel.

text: When using a megohmmeter to test insulation, good insulation will be indicated by _____________.

text: The process, whereby electrons gain sufficient energy to bereleased from the surface of a thin, heated metal plate, isknown as _____________.

In a series circuit, which value will remain unchanged at all places in the circuit?

options: Additional heat sinks will be required

text: The purpose of a motor undervoltage protection device is to _____________.

text: A motor controller contains three selector push buttons  labeled "start", "jog", and "stop". When the "jog" button is pushed, the motor _____________.
options: permit a smaller air gap with the starter

text: A three-phase, induction-type motor experiences an open in one phase. Which of the listed automatic protective devices will prevent the machine from being damaged?

options: insulation may be covered with moisture

text: Most conducting materials such as copper, aluminum, iron, nickel, and tungsten _____________.
options: increase in resistance with increased temperature

the flow of current to the protection device is reversed
the electrical current exceeds the rated value of the fuse

options: Measure the current flow and compare it with the motor full load current flow as shown on the nameplate.

a poor ground for the meter case

laminations in the generator field pieces tendency for the motor to overspeed

options: both the aft and foward bearings should be replaced.

text: The armature cores of the D.C. motors are constructed with laminations to ___________.

options: no resistance accompanied by stray inductance

options: conduct a bar to bar test of the armature
conduct an insulation resistance test of the armature
test the commutator for a ground

If a DC motor runs hot, the cause may be _____________.
options: an open in the shunt field

text: An operational amplifier, as used in today's consoles, has a calculated gain of 5. This means that when the input  changes _____________.

text: Damp armature windings in a D.C. motor may lead to ____________.
When the length and cross sectional area of a wire are both tripled, the resistance _____________.

options: A four-pole synchronous motor under normal load.

text: Which of the listed colors properly describes a DC motor commutator when correct commutation is taking place?

the paint dust is composed of abrasive and semi-conducting materials which impair insulation

the alternator was operating out of synchronism

text: On large generators, space heaters are used to ____________.
options: keep the machine at ambient tmperature of the machinery space
maintain rotor and stator winding temperatures above the dew point to prevent the formation of condensation
prevent condensation in the lube oil
prevent electrolysis due to condensation in the bearings

text: An AC generator produces 60 Hz at 1800 RPM. If the   generator speed is increased to 1830 RPM, the cycles will _____________.

short circuiting the armature and field windings
short circuiting the field windings and passing current  through the armature

text: Three 12 volt, lead-acid, batteries connected in series will develop __________.

options: Severe cross currents will occur which could cause damage.

Both alternators will parallel 180° out of phase.

text: According to Regulations , which of the following systems must be arranged so as to be energized by the final emergency power source?

each power operated watertight door system

text: Hysteresis in a direct current generator is indicated by _____________.

one field coil to each adjacent field coil in turn
any suitable ground to any available line lead

options: number of turns of wire in the armature coil

options: Carefully wiping off the components with a soft cotton rag.
Blowing a high velocity stream of compressed air rapidly across the components.
Using a vacuum cleaner to remove debris from the components.
Using carbon tetrachloride as a cleaning solvent to clean the components.

text: The torque produced by a motor when its shaft will not turn, even though rated voltage is applied to the stator, is known as _____________.

options: shape of bulb and type of service

options: testing of the individual cell voltages
ampere hour capacity of the battery

options: the recommended current and voltage rating
higher current and lower voltage rating
lower current and higher voltage rating

options: conduct electric current to an outside circuit

text: Which of the listed precautions should be observed before spraying liquid solvent on the insulation of an electric motor?
options: Slow the motor down to low speed.

text: An insulation resistance test is performed on a particular piece of electric equipment. In addition to the resistance reading, what information listed below should be entered in the electrical log?

The normal temperature rise of the machine.

test lamp across adjacent fields allow the motor to restart automatically on restoration of voltage without manually resetting
copper jumper across the interpole connections prevent the motor from restarting automatically on   restoration of voltage

text: The cross-sectional area of shipboard electrical cable is expressed in _____________.

options: hand-operated field rheostat connected in series with the shunt field circuit
separate exciter in a series with the shunt field

a diode in series with a temperature sensitive capacitor

text: Copper is often used as an electrical conductor because it _______________.

text: Batteries used for diesel engine starting should __________.

be located as close as possible to the engine

text: AC circuits develop resistance, inductance, and capacitance. The inductive reactance of a circuit is expressed in  _____________.

text: The speed of a squirrel cage induction motor is determined by the _____________.

After a 10 minute delay to the input command.

options: number of phases to the motor

text: During the charging process of storage batteries, the  charging rooms should be well ventilated because __________.

text: A circuit is protected from overheating by a/an ___________.

options: Full current is supplied to the shunt field, series field, and armature.
Full line current is supplied to the shunt and series  fields, and reduced current is supplied to the armature.

text: The sub-multiple prefix "milli" (m) means ____________.

A saturable reactor uses relatively small DC currents to control _______________.
Which of the following devices should be used to measure the temperature of a battery electrolyte?

text: Which of the following statements concerning a simple  parallel resistance circuit is correct?

The total current flow equals the reciprocal of the sum of the individual currents.
The total resistance equals the sum of the individual  resistances.

text: When troubleshooting an electronic circuit, a cold solder joint can be located with the aid of an ohmmeter. Once  the problem has been located, you should _________________.

text: Which of the following conditions indicates a short   circuited capacitor when checking its condition with an  ohmmeter?

text: A resistor placed in parallel to the output of a power  supply _____________.

text: If two AC generators have just been placed in parallel, the true power load is initially distributed evenly by   _____________.

text: When paralleling two alternators, the synchronizing lamps remain lit as the synchroscope pointer approaches the 0°. This indicates the _____________.

alternator power factors are in phase

options: "slow" direction, just before the 12 o'clock position
"fast" direction, just after the 12 o'clock position
"fast" direction, just before the 12 o'clock position
"slow" direction, just after the 12 o'clock position

text: Which of the following types of insulation will begin to deteriorate FIRST as a result of the heat generated in the conductor it surrounds?

options: controlled by placing the governor switch in the automatic position
slightly greater than the bus frequency
slightly less than the bus frequency

text: A flickering ground detection lamp on a DC system would  indicate a _____________.
options: multiple-ground condition in the distribution system
ground in an armature coil of an operating machine
ground in a motor accompanied with a short
short between two adjacent bars of the generator commutator

text: The unit "hertz" is equivalent to _____________.

options: connect the motor and then use the "jog" button to determine the direction of rotation
connect the phase indicator to the motor leads, rotate the motor by hand and then connect to the supply voltage
connect the phase indicator to the supply voltage then  connect the motor
check the supply line phase sequence and motor rotation with appropriate indicators, then connect correspondingly marked leads

text: Why is it a good practice to have the frequency of the  incoming alternator adjusted slightly higher than that of the loaded alternator when paralleling two alternators?
options: This allows the oncoming machine to accept load immediately.
This prevents the machine from floating on the line.
The reverse power relay is prevented from activating.

text: Two paralleled alternators are operating near rated load. If one trips out mechanically, which of the listed actions should be taken FIRST?
options: Strip the board of all non-vital circuits.
Transfer all vital loads to the emergency bus.

text: If all of the ground detection lamps burn with equal  brilliance, whether the test button is depressed or   released, then ___________.

options: I only a hand cranked generator
either I or II milliammeter is normally powered by _____________. the current in the circuit being tested

text: Electrical power is expressed in _____________.
Prior to closing the breaker when paralleling two AC  generators, the recommended practice is to have the   frequency of the incoming machine _____________.
options: slightly less than the line frequency
the same as the line frequency
slightly greater than the line frequency

text: The greatest single cause of electrical failures is ______.
Current flowing in only one direction is called ___________.

options: a short in the exciter field windings
an excessive number of minor system grounds

text: Routine maintenance of dry-type transformers should include______________.
options: preventing the entrance of water from broken pipe lines steam lines
keeping protective surfaces and insulating bushings free of dirt and conductive debris
periodic testing of insulation resistance with a megger

text: A capacitor discolored due to excessive heat should be _____________.

replaced and the reason for the overheating found
cooled with a spray can of refrigerant approved for this purpose
resoldered with care taken to insure that the origional cold solder joint is repaired

determine the condition of the bearings
provide for the correct proper tightening of the field coil bolts and correct lateral adjustment of the field coils

text: After closing the circuit breaker to place two similar  alternators in parallel, the NEXT step is to balance the _____________.

check the bearing insulating block on one end of the unit
replace the bearing with a sealed roller type
replace the thrust bearing of the prime mover

text: A single-phase induction motor will only start if you spin the rotor rapidly with the line switch closed. After starting, its speed fluctuates between very slow and half-speed. The problem probably lies in the ________.

On some electrical generating equipment one outboard bearing pedestal is insulated from the bedplate. This should be checked with a millivolt meter and a jumper. With the millivolt meter connectd between the shaft and the bedplate how should the jumper be
options: It should be placed from one end of the shaft to the other to eliminate shaft currents.
It is used to short the + and - in a D.C. generator or Phase A and Phase C in an alternator to eleminate the effects of CEMF.
It should be placed across the insulating block to increase the shaft current to a point where it can be measured with the millivolt meter.
It should be placed from the shaft to the pedestal while one reading is taken, then removed to take a second reading. This eliminates the insulating effect of the bearing.

text: The failure of ball bearings used in electric motors can result from _____________.
options: failure to clean the bearing before repacking
excess lubrication forcing the bearing full of grease and eliminating all areas of expansion

text: On some electrical generating equipment one outboard bearing pedestal is insulated from the bedplate. To check this insulation with the machine assembled you should use a____________.

On electrical generators one of the bearings is isolated from the bedplate. This insulating block should not be painted and must be kept clean to ___________.

allow for the expansion of the generator away from the prime mover as it warms up

text: When testing for blown fuses in a three-phase supply  circuit to a motor, you should first ___________________.

apply an ammeter diagonally across the top of the first line fuse and the bottom of the third line fuse
apply the voltage tester across the bottoms of the line  fuses
ensure the circuit is de-energized, and then use a   continuity tester

text: In a three-phase electrical system, three ground detecting lamps are provided. One lamp goes dark and the others  increase in brightness. When the test button is pushed, all lamps have equal illumination. You should conclude that ____________.
options: there is a ground on the line with the dark lamp
the dark lamp must be replaced
there are grounds on the lines with the bright lamps

text: Which of the listed conditions will occur if dirt and grease are allowed to accumulate between the commutator segments of a motor?

An open circuit in the armature

there are grounds in two of the three phases

text: If an electric motor fails to start, you should FIRST check the _____________.

text: The prime mover of an AC two pole main propulsion generator drives the generator at 3600 RPM. If the main propulsion motor has 80 poles, what will be the propeller speed?

text: If an alternator is to be inactive for a considerable period of time, which of the following actions should be taken?

options: negative deflection of the wattmeter pointer
positive deflection of the wattmeter pointer

lose its load due to the inherent speed droop built into the governor Insulation resistance readings should be taken weekly to ensure resistance is not deteriorating. 0.02439

lose its load, begin to motorize, trip out on reverse power relay, and possibly overspeed bearing supports. 0.015 The windings and collector rings should be protected with a thin coat of grease or oil.

remain constant as the temperature of the windings increases

the direction of rotation will be reversed

flashed with direct current to remove any residual magnetism
kept warm by using strip or space heaters
relieved of all capacitive charge by grounding the   conductors

options: the same as the original resistance

cause the slip rings to melt

options: Increasing ambient temperature increases local action.

Ambient temperature has no effect on local action.
At 32°C all local action virtually ceases.

text: Which of the following losses is/are present in every direct current generator armature?

options: Ground the case of the machine before beginning any repairs.
Open the supply circuits and tag the switches.

text: Which of the following precautions should be taken when a blown fuse, rated at 10 amperes, is replaced?
options: Short out the fuse before removing it from the circuit.
Use needle-nose pliers to remove fuse from the circuit.
Replace blown fuse with one of equal voltage and ampere capacity.
Fuses of 10 ampere rating and less are virtually harmless when energized and may be handled freely.

text: Receptacle outlets aboard ship should be designed so those mounted  have _____________.
options: there must be a sufficient number of receptacle outlets in the crew accommodations for an adequate level of habitability
each receptacle outelt must be compatible with the voltage and current of the circuit in which it is installed
a receptacle outlet must not have any exposed parts with the plug opening uncovered

text: According to Regulations , which of the following is an acceptable lining for battery trays   containing alkaline batteries?
If only one brush on a commutator is sparking excessively, you should look for _____________.

options: Ascertain cause of the low lube oil pressure.
Strip the board of all nonvital circuits.
Secure alarms, reset reverse power relay, and restart #1 engine.

text: Upon failure of the normal power supply, the emergency  generator is placed on the line by the _____________.

options: emergency generator supply to the emergency switchboard
emergency generator supply to the main switchboard
battery supply to the main switchboard
turbogenerator supply to the emergency switchboard

text: Which of the listed safety features should be provided in small rooms or lockers where batteries are stored?
options: Installation of a fixed CO2 system.
An exhaust duct is to be provided and led from within three inches of the deck.
Power ventilation is to be provided if trickle charging is utilized.
An exhaust duct is to be provided and led from the top of the locker to the open air.

text: Before any work on electrical or electronic equipment is performed, which of the following precautions should be  carried out?
options: Secure and tag the supply circuit breaker in the open  position.
Station a man at the circuit supply switch.

text: Regulations require that an indicating light at the propulsion control station will operate if overloading or overheating occurs in a _______________.

options: at the submersible bilge pump 1/2 hour
above the uppermost continuous deck 1 hour
at the engine room emergency control panel 2 hours

text: Regulations  require the minimum number of ships service generators for ocean vessels to be   _____________.
When power ventilation is required in a battery compartment, Regulations require _____________.
options: the power ventilation system to be separate from ventilation systems for other spaces
electric ventilation motors to be inside the vent duct
electric ventilation motors to be inside the compartment

text: In accordance with Regulations ,  receptacles for refrigerated containers must ____________.
options: have a switch near the receptacles that disconnects all  power to those receptacles
have a sign stating that the switch should be opened  before cables are disconnected from the receptacles
be designed for circuit breaking service

text: Regulations  require emergency diesel engine starting systems to have sufficient capacity to  provide power for at least ____________.

options: circuit breaker with an instantaneous trip only

text: Regulations  require each motor  controller to have a wiring diagram located ____________.
options: on the inside of the controller door

text: Regulations  require that the emergency lighting and power system _____________.
options: emergency generator must be tested under load before sailing
must be tested and inspected weekly and the date recorded
batteries must be tested annually and the date recorded
must be capable of sustaining the emergency load for 48  hours

text: Which of the following statements is a Regulation  concerning emergency generator diesel engines?
options: The fuel must have a flash point not less than 24°C.
Emergency diesel engines must be capable of operating under full load in not less than 30 seconds after cranking.
The starting battery must produce 12 consecutive cranking cycles.
Emergency diesel engines must operate satisfactorily up to a 22.5° list.
